title: Interest Rate Derivatives Exercises

exercises.title: Interest Rate Swap
exercises.description: Implement swap valuation and par rate calculation
exercises.starterCode:

from typing import List

        self.is_payer = is_payer

        pass
    
    def floating_leg_pv(self, discount_factors: np.ndarray, forward_rates: np.ndarray) -> float:
        """PV of floating leg = N * sum(f_i * tau_i * df_i)"""

        pass
    
    def value(self, discount_factors: np.ndarray, forward_rates: np.ndarray) -> float:
        """Swap value from payer perspective."""
        # TODO: Implement
        pass
    
    def par_rate(self, discount_factors: np.ndarray) -> float:
        """Par rate = (1 - df_n) / sum(tau_i * df_i)"""

hints: Fixed PV: sum tau*df weighted by fixed rate
Par rate makes fixed PV = floating PV

testCases.input:
swap = InterestRateSwap(1000000, 0.05, [0,1,2], True)
df = np.array([1.0, 0.95, 0.90])
fwd = np.array([0.05, 0.055])
abs(swap.value(df, fwd)) < 50000

exercises.title: Yield Curve Builder
exercises.description: Bootstrap discount factors from swap rates

        pass

exercises.solution:
import numpy as np
from typing import List

class YieldCurveBuilder:
    def __init__(self, swap_rates: List[float], tenors: List[float]):
        self.swap_rates = swap_rates
        self.tenors = tenors
    
    def bootstrap_discount_factors(self) -> np.ndarray:
        n = len(self.tenors)
        df = np.zeros(n+1)
        df[0] = 1.0
        for i in range(n):
            rate = self.swap_rates[i]
            tau = self.tenors[i] - (self.tenors[i-1] if i > 0 else 0)
            sum_df = sum(df[j+1] * (self.tenors[j] - (self.tenors[j-1] if j > 0 else 0)) for j in range(i))
            df[i+1] = (1 - rate * sum_df) / (1 + rate * tau)
        return df
    
    def forward_rate(self, df: np.ndarray, t1: int, t2: int) -> float:
        tau = self.tenors[t2] - self.tenors[t1]
        return (df[t1+1] / df[t2+1] - 1) / tau
hints: Bootstrap iteratively from short to long tenors

testCases.input:
yc = YieldCurveBuilder([0.03, 0.035, 0.04], [1, 2, 3])
df = yc.bootstrap_discount_factors()
df[0] == 1.0 and df[-1] < 1.0
